title: TetraBlocks Mosaic
description: Welcome to TetraBlocks Mosaic! You have a grid object to fill. Find Tetris-style blocks around and place them cleverly to fill the grid. Arrange all the blocks within the time limit to create a nice object. Enjoy solving 30 puzzles and make 30 exciting items!
instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to move and fix the tetrablocks in the grid
